name: Apollo 12
left: Descent stage · ALSEP · flag · retrieved parts of Surveyor 3
fact: The precision landing — Conrad touched down within 183 m of the uncrewed Surveyor 3 probe (1967). They retrieved pieces of it for return to Earth, showing spacecraft survive years on the Moon undamaged by radiation or micrometeorites. A proof-of-concept for future rendezvous missions.
capability: First precision landing at a designated point — the prerequisite for any sample-return rendezvous architecture, including Mars.
